_note: Rough buildout from mattfryed.com/eyeknow-manor. NOTE: the source page's intro paragraph actually describes a different project (NYBG 'Wild Medicine' AR app) — looks like mis-pasted copy — so it was NOT used; the CLASSIFICATION here is a draft synthesis of the project's own disciplines, pending Matt's real copy. Tarot images are Matt's own, referenced by URL from his Squarespace CDN. Node geometry + colours match the live roster (P-01).
name: EYEKNOW MANOR

intro.title: CLASSIFICATION
intro.body:
The Eyeknow Manor of Spirits & Astonishments — an immersive experiential build that runs a haunted-house logic across real technology. Integrated facial-recognition watches the room; living portraits, a Pepper's Ghost fortune teller, a custom-illustrated tarot deck, and a live CRT array turn an interior into an apparatus for being seen.

[Draft overview — to be replaced with Matt's final copy.]

nodes.label: Experiential Design
nodes.blurb: The whole apparatus — the Manor as a single immersive instrument.

nodes.label: Integrated Facial Recognition AI system
nodes.blurb: The Manor watches back — recognition wired into the experience.

nodes.blurb: The physical build of the rooms and their effects.

nodes.blurb: Portraits that turn, blink, and follow.

nodes.blurb: A 19th-century illusion driving a fortune-telling automaton.

nodes.blurb: The Manor's rooms, dressing, and atmosphere.

blocks.title: THE DECK
blocks.body: A custom-illustrated major arcana — twenty-two cards plus a back design — drawn for the Manor's fortune-telling.

nodes.label: CRT Array Streaming Display
nodes.blurb: A wall of CRTs switching between dispersed content and a phone-streamed live cam.

blocks.title: CRT ARRAY
blocks.body: An array of CRTs, with a system for switching between dispersed content and a mapped live cam via phone stream.
